content.en:
Rumble!!!

A bone dragon flew from a distance at great speed, its whole body was dark, and it was an undead creature transformed from the bones of a black dragon.

Its aura was very powerful, far more powerful than the average Great God level, and even those previous Demon Killers were not as powerful as this Skull Dragon.

"It's a bone dragon formed after the death of the cosmic god black dragon!"

Jin Shan immediately recognized the origin of the bone dragon and hurriedly said.

"The bones of the cosmic god black dragon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Due to the restrictions of the rules of the universe, it is difficult for a strong person above the god level to improve the strength of the physical body, and the physical body of the cosmic god seems to be no different from the great god level, but in fact the difference is very big.

First, the physical bodies of the two, one is the physical immortality, and the other has a lifespan limit.

In terms of life level, the cosmic god is a pseudo-fourth-order life, while the great god is at most a pseudo-third-order life, and the life level of the two sides is different, which directly leads to the lack of defensive effect of the physical body.

The defense ability of the cosmic god black dragon corpse bone is very strong, and the recovery ability is also very strong, which is not comparable to the great god level.

In addition, it is very likely that the bones of this skull dragon contain the dragon power of the cosmic god black dragon, even if the remnants are not moving, and it is difficult for the bone dragon to control this power, once it erupts, it can form a terrifying impact.

In addition, this skull dragon still has a faint cosmic god power, which will also form a huge pressure on the great god level, making it difficult for the great god level to exert its strong strength.

At this time, Jin Shan was affected.

She was originally a dragon clan, although she was a golden dragon clan and had a noble bloodline, she still couldn't resist the dragon power of the cosmic god level.

Therefore, on the occasion of the arrival of this skull dragon, the faint cosmic divine dragon power made her face pale slightly.

"Leave it to me!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Immediately, he struck.

"Six Chaos Palms!"

A six-fingered palm appeared in the void, each finger contained a force, and the power of the six realms circulated and circulated, forming a terrifying power of six reincarnation suppression, coupled with the power of the Chaos Dao, making the six reincarnation palms an incomparably terrifying divine secret technique.

Bang!!!

The six chaotic palms suppressed it, and the skull dragon struggled to resist, but its power was suppressed by the six paths, and it couldn't exert itself at all, and it couldn't even escape.

"Roar!!

A black light came out of the bone dragon's body, which was the power that belonged to the cosmic god, and it burst out at this moment.

It's a pity that this force has gone through a long time, and it is no longer as powerful as it was at the beginning, and now it can only deal with other great god levels, and it can't shake a son of the era like Ye Tian at all.

Click!!

In an instant, the bone dragon was shattered by Ye Tian's six chaotic palms, and fragments were scattered everywhere.

After a palm bombardment, Ye Tiandao: "Little Princess Jinshan, let's move on!"

"Uh, good!"

Jin Shan nodded stunnedly.

Although she had already seen Ye Tian's strength, she was still extremely shocked to see the bone dragon that the Cosmic God Black Dragon had turned into being killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

"It's too strong!"

She couldn't even know what Ye Tian's ultimate combat power was now, and she finally understood why those high-ranking people in the clan praised His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Terran race so much.

One man and one dragon continue to move forward.

In the depths of the Forbidden Land of Dusk, there are many undead creatures, and once again they even encountered an army of undead, all of which are composed of the bones of fierce beasts, among which there is no shortage of undead composed of bones of cosmic gods and fierce beasts.

Although Ye Tian was confident that he could fight hard with the army of the undead, after all, his strength was unlimited, and he was supported by the Chaos Ancient Realm, and he was not afraid of running out of power.

But in order not to waste time, Ye Tian still took Jin Shan to make a detour to prevent being trapped by these undead army.

Finally.

Ye Tian and Jin Shan came to their destination, that is, the place where they had the World Source Stone.

"Your Highness Wanfa, this is it!"

Jin Shan pointed to a river not far ahead, and said.

Ye Tian looked over and quickly found that this river was not a real river, but a blood river.

From this river of blood, Ye Tian actually sensed a hint of threat, although it was only a hint, but it was enough to prove that this place was very dangerous.

"Little Princess Jinshan, do you know the origin of this blood river?"

Ye Tian asked.

Jin Shan said the information he obtained from the classics: "You know, it is said that in ancient times, the fierce beasts fought in the civil war, countless fierce beasts died, and a lot of blood flowed here, forming a river of blood. And the Blood River also gave birth to a special kind of creature, that is, the Blood Beast. This blood beast relies on the river of blood, and as long as it is in the river of blood, its strength is almost never exhausted, and it is very difficult to kill. It is said that there are many blood beasts in the blood river, and as for how many there are, I don't know how many. Originally, I had prepared some special weapons specifically for the Blood Beasts, which were carried by my guards and dealt with by those Blood Beasts. Unexpectedly, those guards died in battle to protect me shortly after entering the Dusk Forbidden Land!"

"The World Source Stone should be at the bottom of the Blood River, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hmm!"

Jin Shan nodded.

"You're just waiting outside the River of Blood, if you go into the River of Blood, I'm afraid I won't be able to take care of you!"

Ye Tian said seriously.

"Good!"

Jin Shan nodded helplessly.

In the Dragon Clan, her strength is one of the best among the great gods, and she usually treats others as a burden, but now she seems to be regarded as a burden by Ye Tian.

But there is no way, her strength is indeed very weak, it is difficult to enter the bottom of the blood river at all, and it is easy to be surrounded by a large number of blood beasts and fall.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew into the Blood River, but as soon as he entered the Blood River, a large group of blood beasts rushed over.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to envelop this area and saw the talent of a large number of blood beasts.

Judging from the talent of these blood beasts, they have a common talent - the blood talent!

Obviously, this blood-derived talent should have something to do with this blood river, and it should be able to draw strength from these blood rivers, otherwise, relying on other talents alone, there is no way to threaten a peak-level cosmic son like Jin Shan.

It can also be said that without this blood river, these blood beasts are waste!

Seeing that these blood beasts were besieging him, Ye Tian released a large number of spatial blades.

Puff puff!!!

One by one, the blood beasts were hit by the spatial blades, and their bodies were split into many parts, but they quickly recovered under the wrapping of the power of the blood river.

"It's really hard to kill, but I just don't know if you can fight against the poison curse talent!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, Ye Tian cast a poisonous spell talent and released a curse poison on these blood beasts.

Soon, the curse Gu poison spread, and blood was completely the best medium to transmit it, so that many blood beasts were contaminated with the curse Gu poison.

Gradually, green spots began to appear on the blood beasts, and they spread at an incredible speed.

After a while, a large number of blood beasts were completely invaded by the curse Gu poison and were transformed into cursed poison beasts.

And Ye Tian can control these curse beasts, this is the horror of the poison curse talent.

However, this is also because these blood beasts themselves are very weak, they are completely powerful by the blood river, and the poison curse talent is completely their nemesis.

"Whenever a blood beast comes near me, attack them!"

Ye Tian gave the order.
